supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on single third-party vendor for manufacturing and distribution of retail desktop software products; key single-source vendor for financial supplies printing and fulfillment; dependence on public cloud providers (AWS, Google Cloud) for systems and infrastructure
supply_chain.risks: Single-source vendor dependencies for manufacturing and financial supplies; reliance on third-party cloud providers for critical infrastructure; supply chain disruptions from vendor failures; concentration risk with key suppliers

regulatory_risks: Federal and state government requirements for electronic filing of tax returns
Regulations on tax preparer assistance and use of customer information
Payroll services regulatory requirements
Payment processing regulatory requirements
Financial services regulations for lending and payments products
Data privacy and security regulations (GDPR in EU)
Growing number of U.S. state data privacy laws in absence of unified federal standard
Cross-border data transfer regulations and requirements
AI regulatory frameworks (EU AI Act adopted May 2024)
FTC order requiring adherence to certain marketing practices
Money transmission licensing requirements
Consumer protection regulations
Antitrust and competition regulations
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
U.K. Bribery Act compliance
Import and export regulations including sanctions compliance
State revenue agency standards for tax preparation and electronic filing
Increasing regulatory scrutiny of tax preparation industry
Environmental, health and safety regulations
Labor laws and regulations in multiple jurisdictions
Advertising and marketing regulations
Real estate and insurance regulations
Foreign exchange controls and cash repatriation restrictions
Evolving and complex foreign and U.S. laws affecting international operations

sanction_risks: Compliance with sanctions arising from Russia-Ukraine war
Import and export sanctions compliance requirements
